name: 9GAG
description: Operator of an online platform and social media website designed to share user-generated content. The company's online platform and social media website provides comical images that features user-generated videos under categories such as fail and prank, comedy, game, TV and music, providing users with an engagement platform for fun, conversation and connection.

name: Artiphon
description: Developer of digital musical device designed to make musical expression ubiquitous and accessible to all. The company's device help to create songs with intuitive gestures like tapping, sliding, and waving, has a built-in speaker, and can switch between guitar, violin, piano, and drums at the press of a button, enabling users to have a digital instrument that adapts to the way they play.

name: Bustle
description: Developer of a digital media platform designed for young readers. The company's platform delivers everything readers want to read, including news, celebrity, culture, lifestyle, politics, fashion and beauty, enabling readers and social fans to get everything they need to know in one place and stay updated on all the things they love.

name: Beatdapp
description: Operator of a SaaS-based platform intended to help music labels and artists track their songs to collect royalties. The company's tracking system authenticates, verifies, and validates media streamed in real-time and reduces the tracking discrepancies between Digital Service Providers (DSPs) and rights holders, enabling DSPs to increase their royalty revenue for rights holders while limiting legal exposure to royalty lawsuits.

name: Catnip
description: Developer of a no-code chatbot platform intended to automate communication with humans through messaging applications. The company's platform helps to build a bot without coding to automatically start conversations with prospects from post comments to increase lead generation and qualification, upsell, cross-sell, and boost revenue on WhatsApp, enabling e-commerce marketers and business owners to increase sales, reduce costs and automate support through chatbots.

name: CloutJam
description: Global infrastructure for the next generation of content-driven, creator-led marketing.

name: Dusk
description: Operator of a nightlife platform designed to offer exclusive offers, access, and free drinks. The company's platform permits users to find their nearest bar and show the screen to the bartender to get free drinks and exclusive discounts, enabling them to save money while enjoying too and partner venues to increase their revenues through unique offers.

name: ESPL
description: Operator of a global media network intended to organize sports tournaments and events. The company's network specializes in creating a platform for entrepreneurs, engineers, gamers, and industry specialists to compete in online and on-ground tournaments, enabling gamers to access and participate in various global e-sports competitions.

name: EventXtra
description: Developer of virtual event platform designed to help enterprises manage big events online. The company's platform allows enterprises to have their exhibitions, job fairs and trade shows online, provides real time registration, event management services and event organizing services that helps event organizers with guest check-ins and walk-in on-site registration, providing a one-stop platform for event management and organization.

name: Filmgrail
description: Developer of a cinema marketing and analytics platform designed to help exhibitors sell tickets and engage with moviegoers. The company's platform assists brands in engaging with movie enthusiasts by automating content creation, audience engagement and marketing and provides exhibitors with insights into their audience, such as their demographics, interests and purchase behaviour, enabling cinemas and movie studios to engage their audiences, target their marketing, and grow their brands.

name: Firstory
description: All in one podcast platform with monetization solutions

name: Fitzy
description: Operator of an open internet TV platform designed to watch and record internet TV channel that supports online streaming in a single user interface on Smart TV device. The company's web crawler scans the internet for the best channels, enabling users to unlock paid content with their subscription services and enjoy a selection of free internet television.

name: Jubilee
description: Provider of weekly digital videos intended to create a movement for human good. The company's videos convey the power of empathy for human good bridge people together and challenge conventional thinking, enabling customers to get motivated and create a positive impact in their lives.

name: Buffd
description: Provider of broadcasting and streaming services intended to discover, watch and engage in various esports events. The company's platform aggregates and indexes every major esports tournament from various esports games into one destination to keep users informed and up to date in esports, enabling esports fans to watch every live streaming and access related data ranging from team/player profiles, brackets, standings and stats in one place.

name: Kerning Cultures
description: Developer of a storytelling application intended to offer radio documentaries. The company's application offers independent podcasts raising the bar for audio storytelling and journalism and offers stories from regional myths of the Middle East and North Africa with podcasts, enabling customers to get audio stories and also a lineup of immersive Arabic and English podcasts.

name: Shekar
description: Operator of an entertainment and media platform intended to create and share viral Korean pop culture content in English. The company's platform creates shareable content with Korean music, dramas, movies, celebrities, fashion, culture, and more, enabling fans to follow their favorite music and entertainment from the performers.

name: Kura
description: Developer of an augmented reality system designed to build the next-generation augmented reality optics and display modules. The company offers augmented reality glasses that provide a view that works under daylight, have bio-sensor inputs, and use a microdisplay instead of a huge display phone, and artificial intelligence for empowering and connecting people, enabling clients to read emotional feedback and molecule structure in the environment with use cases in global telepresence, training, and visualization.

name: Mars Reel
description: Operator of an online sports-focused media platform intended to provide news coverage of sports athletes and teams in high school hoops. The company's platform offer viewers with short highlight videos and cool music delivered to their mobile devices, enabling users to discover all the latest international sports news and videos under one website.

name: Melodics
description: Developer of a desktop application designed to help people to play their musical instruments with confidence. The company's application offers music lessons that build a rhythm, timing, and muscle memory to develop an understanding of the patterns, theory, and structure of contemporary music through active learning and performance, enabling music enthusiasts to improve musical skills by making practice fun, relevant, and effective.

name: Motion Elements
description: Developer of a microstock marketplace designed to connect digital artists and filmmakers for the promotion of digital media. The company's marketplace offers a web-based platform to purchase worldwide stock animation, video footage, after effects templates, apple motion templates, and online music tracks, enabling users to view various forms of digital media and purchase according to their requirements.

name: PaceMaker
description: Developer of a music mixing tool designed to help mix music using artificial intelligence. The company's artificial intelligence technology based application, enables users to create and monetize DJ mixes using licensed streams from Spotify and other music stream apps.

name: Partyphile
description: Developer of an event discovery application. The company's event discovery application allows to discover the best parties, events and nightlife hotspots, enabling users to book tables and get on the guest list through the application.

name: Peatix
description: Developer of a global event discovery platform designed to connect individuals with experiences across diverse categories, fostering shared passions and building vibrant communities. The company's platform offers a seamless search and ticketing experience for thousands of events, from art exhibitions and live music to workshops and conferences, enabling businesses to discover new interests, connect with like-minded individuals, and participate in unforgettable experiences.

name: Pop.in
description: Developer of an online gaming platform designed to empower human connection through the gaming experience. The company's platform offers users to play live games, discover new people or collaborate and play without leaving home, enabling people to socialize in an intimate setting or larger group setting with others globally.

name: Pose
description: Operator of a media production house intended to inform users about recent events and happenings. The company publishes news and photos of events, nightlife entertainment, celebrity information and other entertainment-related subjects along with event organizing services, enabling individuals to stay updated on recent and significant advancements in the fields.

name: Resonado Labs
description: Developer of audio technology tools intended to reimage the way people experience sound. The company provides proprietary audio technology tools that enable Business-to-Business customers to realize the coexistence of design innovation and superior performance in their audio products, enabling clients to design innovative audio products while maintaining high-fidelity acoustic performance.

name: Rooster
description: Operator of a digital literary studio intended to focus on promoting digital publishing among readers. The company's studio offers curated mobile reading service, virtual reality adaptation of novels, recovers classics, creates motion stories, and powers a subway library, enabling readers to have free access to hundreds of e-books, excerpts, and short stories.

name: Sajilni
description: Developer of event management platform designed to help in event management and ticket booking. The company's platform helps event promoters and venue owners create, promote, sell and manage events online and increase ticket sales, it also helps to manage attendees, extract reports and send invitations to all kinds of events, providing event organizers with a complete event management platform that is simple, convenient and easy to use.

name: Scouter
description: Operator of an online property rental platform intended to provide vacation properties. The company's platform offers properties for various events such as workshops, parties, shooting, etc, and also allows owners to rent out their property via its platform, enabling users to book properties according to their requirements.

name: Synervoz
description: Developer of an innovation & software studio intended to focus on audio, entertainment, and online collaboration. The company has designed, developed, and co-created apps, SDKs, and embedded products with complex audio pipelines focused on custom engineering solutions for other companies and source code that can be licensed or purchased outright, enabling clients to have access to applications that are balanced in real-time and offers non-live content that can be synchronized between parties.

name: VlogEasy
description: Developer of video editing software designed to save the editing hours for video loggers. The company's software offers a wide range of features including unlimited cloud storage, the ability to import 4k footage, a jumpcut feature along with a cross-platform service, and automatically edit vlogs for users in real-time, enabling users to make and edit videos while reducing costs.

name: The Ticket Fairy
description: Ticket Fairy is Salesforce meets Eventbrite - AI-enabled vertical SaaS for events and venues that skyrockets their revenues and accelerates their path to profitability!

name: TicketRev
description: Operator of a reverse marketplace intended to buy and resell live event tickets. The company's platform offers buyers to create bids on events by choosing their preferred seating location and naming their offer price, enabling sellers to accept a matching bid and resell their tickets instantly.

name: TNL Mediagene (News Lens Key Review Network Co., Ltd.)
description: Developer of digital advertising, data analytics, and media platforms intended to provide original and current media content to the Asian market. The company platform provides inclusive, in-depth, diverse, and highly influential content for digital readers, it grasps user information through zero-party, first-party, and third-party databases, AI analysis, Martech, and other cross-domain core products, enabling users to get suitable reading content and to easily share, discuss and participate in topics they are interested in.

name: Trend
description:
Trend is building the world’s largest decentralized creative AI powered studio. Trend automates content creation for brands and replaces their creative agencies.

On track for generating $1m+ this year

Customers like Nestle, Huel, Unilever

Backed by Flybridge, Pharrell Williams, Techstars Ventures, founders of Twitch, Rotten Tomatoes, Kabam, Crunchyroll etc.

name: UTURN
description: Operator of an entertainment network intended to produce premium content with the aim to promote Arabic content globally. The company's entertainment network produces multimedia content that can be availed via Uturn application and YouTube, thereby providing users with social, fun and interactive multimedia content.

name: 360 VUZ
description: Developer of a social video mobile application intended to offer a virtual reality-based entertainment experience. The company's application streams live virtual sports, talk shows, music, and events with gyroscope support, enabling users to experience live events and shows in an immersive manner.

name: Wave AI
description: Developer of an artificial intelligence platform intended to unlock new heights of human creative expression. The company's platform uses artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies to offer musical assistance, placing the user at the heart of the creative process and tools to help conquer creative blocks by suggesting original lyrics, melodies and chords, enabling artists to creative expression and eliminate creative blocks for their business.

name: Zeemi.tv
description: Provider of a live video streaming platform intended to provide digital concierge service. The company's live video streaming platform includes a community forum for sharing emotion and insights, enabling users to share their experiences and talents via live video from mobile and desktop platforms.

name: Pongalo
description: Provider of digital media services. The company engages into the operation of Spanish-language digital rights of television and feature film content management.

name: Tappy
description: Developer of a social application. The company's application allows user to create a virtual community and location to discover people and relevant content.

name: Holor Media
description: Provider of augmented and virtual reality technologies intended to be used for video creation. The company's augmented and virtual reality technologies offer techniques and applications to facilitate the creation and distribution of video and deliver it to various platforms including desktop and mobile devices, enabling VR/Media creators to next-generation content.

name: Amped
description: Developer of a mobile application designed to offer event updates and ticket booking. The company's mobile application uses data analytics and machine learning to discover and recommend relevant concerts, theater productions, sports games and community events, enabling artists to identify, understand and engage fan base.

name: Movielala
description: Developer of a social network and marketing platform for upcoming movies. The company's personalized and socially designed platform for upcoming movies allows fans to follow stars, discover upcoming movies and share their favorites with friends. It also provides analytics and real-time insights for moviegoers.

name: Viki
description: Provider of online video services. The company provides a platform for streaming premium TV shows and movies, as well as crowdsourcing subtitles in more than 160 languages.

name: Tapastic
description: Developer of an online portal designed to connect readers with writers and comic artists. The company's platform allows creators to publish their work on the website and app, helping creators gain an audience and readers with new content.

name: Texel
description: Provider of a virtual reality platform designed to stream VR and AR content material over existing networks. The company's data driven platform collects data points in real time to provide insights into users' viewing and engagement habits in order to provide a personalized content mix and reduce the bandwidth by more than 50 percent, enabling content providers to understand the deep consumption nature and how to leverage insights to optimize value of their content to result in higher engagement and better monetization.

name: Zya
description: Developer of a mobile based music creation software designed to democratize music creation and expression through imaginative games and apps. The company's Ditty application offers a technology platform that powers musical communication across a range of products and integrations with global companies enabling users to personalize their video, music, and message and collaborate with artists on a variety of platforms including web portals, mobile devices and gaming consoles.

name: PTA Networks
description: Operator of a digital streaming network. The company operates a digital streaming network that is focused on travel and lifestyle content.

name: Semeantoja
description: Provider of a culinary search engine in Latin America. The company provides a search engine which offers a marketing platform for restaurateurs and allows users to search for a restaurant based on various parameters.

name: Plancast
description: Developer of software for social web applications. The company is known for creating the social event discovery service Plancast.
